title: Agricola
desc: Build the best farm! Plow fields, collect grain, raise livestock. A worker-placement classic about 17th century farming.

title: Ark Nova
desc: Plan and build a modern zoo to support conservation. Combine animals, sponsors, and conservation projects.

title: Azul
desc: Draft colorful tiles to decorate the Royal Palace of Evora. A beautiful abstract strategy game of pattern building.

title: Barrage
desc: Build dams, conduits and powerhouses in a tight worker-placement game about hydroelectric energy production.

title: Brass: Birmingham
desc: Build networks, develop industries, and exploit the demand for iron, coal, cotton and pottery in the West Midlands.

title: Catan
desc: Collect and trade resources to build roads, settlements and cities. Race to 10 victory points on the island of Catan.

title: Carcassonne
desc: Place tiles to build the medieval landscape of Carcassonne. Deploy followers as knights, monks, farmers, and thieves.

title: Cascadia
desc: Create the most harmonious Pacific Northwest ecosystem by drafting habitat tiles and wildlife tokens.

title: Clank! A Deck-Building Adventure
desc: Sneak into a dragon's lair, steal artifacts, and escape without making too much noise. A deck-building dungeon adventure.

title: Codenames
desc: Give one-word clues to guide your team to their secret agents. A social word game of deduction and communication.

title: Descent: Journeys in the Dark
desc: Heroes explore dungeons, fight monsters, and complete quests in this tactical dungeon-crawling adventure game.

title: Dixit
desc: One picture is worth a thousand words. Use beautifully illustrated cards to tell stories and guess which card is the storyteller's.

title: Dominion
desc: Build the best deck of action, treasure and victory cards in this genre-defining deck-building game.

title: Everdell
desc: Build a city of critters and constructions in the charming Everdell Valley across four seasons.

title: Gloomhaven
desc: A tactical combat game in a persistent world of shifting motives. Play through a branching campaign as mercenary adventurers.

title: King of Tokyo
desc: Play mutant monsters, gigantic robots and strange aliens battling to become the King of Tokyo!

title: Mysterium
desc: One player is a ghost sending visions through illustrated cards. Others are psychics trying to solve the murder mystery.

title: Nemesis
desc: Survive on a spaceship infested with hostile organisms. A semi-cooperative survival horror board game.

title: Pandemic
desc: Work together to stop four deadly diseases from spreading across the globe. A classic cooperative board game.

title: Photosynthesis
desc: Plant and grow trees in a sun-drenched forest. Strategically position your trees to absorb sunlight and earn points.

title: Root
desc: Wage asymmetric woodland warfare. Each faction has unique abilities, goals and strategies in this acclaimed war game.

title: Sagrada
desc: Draft dice and build beautiful stained glass windows in this colorful puzzle game inspired by the Sagrada Familia.

title: Santorini
desc: Build towers on the Greek island of Santorini. Move your workers and be the first to reach the third level.

title: Chess (FIDE Rules 2017)
desc: The classic game of strategy. Official FIDE rules covering all aspects of competitive chess play.

title: Scythe
desc: In an alternate 1920s Europe, lead your faction to conquer territory, enlist recruits, build structures, and activate mechs.

title: Spirit Island
desc: Powerful spirits defend their island from colonizing invaders in this cooperative strategy game of growing power.

title: Splendor
desc: Collect gems, attract nobles, and build a Renaissance jewelry empire in this elegant engine-building game.

title: Terraforming Mars
desc: Compete as corporations transforming Mars into a habitable world. Raise temperature, create oceans, and plant greenery.

title: Ticket to Ride
desc: Collect train cards and claim railway routes across North America. Connect cities to complete destination tickets.

title: Disney Villainous
desc: Each player takes the role of a Disney villain with unique abilities and objectives in this asymmetric strategy game.

title: Viticulture Essential Edition
desc: Build the most prosperous winery in Tuscany. Plant vines, harvest grapes, make and sell wine across seasons.

title: Wingspan
desc: Attract birds to your wildlife preserves. Each bird has unique powers that create powerful combinations.
